tasks.description: Scaffold Next.js project with TypeScript using create-next-app - targets: package.json, tsconfig.json, next.config.ts
tasks.acceptance: npm run dev starts without errors, TypeScript compiles cleanly

tasks.description: Configure Tailwind CSS with custom theme, import globals.css - targets: tailwind.config.ts, app/globals.css
tasks.acceptance: Tailwind utility classes render correctly in the browser

tasks.description: Set up app directory with root layout and default home page - targets: app/layout.tsx, app/page.tsx
tasks.acceptance: npm run dev renders a page at localhost, layout wraps all pages

tasks.description: Define TypeScript types for all F1 data entities: Session, Driver, Lap, TelemetrySnapshot, TrackLayout, RaceEvent, WeatherReading - targets: lib/types.ts
tasks.acceptance: All OpenF1 API response structures map to typed interfaces with no any usage

tasks.description: Create OpenF1 API client with base URL, fetch wrapper, exponential-backoff rate-limit handling, typed endpoint functions - targets: lib/api/openf1.ts
tasks.acceptance: API client fetches from OpenF1, handles rate limits, returns typed responses

tasks.description: Install Firebase SDK, set up config with env vars, initialize Firebase app - targets: lib/firebase.ts, .env.local
tasks.acceptance: Firebase app initializes without errors using env vars

tasks.description: Build Firebase Auth context provider with sign-up, login, logout, session persistence, useAuth hook - targets: lib/auth/AuthContext.tsx, lib/auth/useAuth.ts
tasks.acceptance: Auth context provides user state, persists across page refreshes

tasks.description: Implement ProtectedRoute wrapper that redirects unauthenticated users - targets: components/ProtectedRoute.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Protected pages redirect to /auth/login when unauthenticated

tasks.description: Configure Vercel deployment: env vars template, build settings - targets: .env.local.example, vercel.json
tasks.acceptance: npm run build completes with 0 errors

tasks.description: Build session listing page: fetch years, rounds, session types from OpenF1 API - targets: app/sessions/page.tsx, components/SessionBrowser.tsx
tasks.acceptance: User navigates year to round to session type in 3 clicks

tasks.description: Build session detail page with event info, circuit, country, date - targets: app/sessions/[year]/[round]/page.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Session detail shows all metadata, replay button present

tasks.description: Build Firebase Auth sign-up page - targets: app/auth/signup/page.tsx
tasks.acceptance: User can create account with email and password

tasks.description: Build Firebase Auth login page with password reset - targets: app/auth/login/page.tsx
tasks.acceptance: User can log in with existing credentials and reset password

tasks.description: Build user account settings page - targets: app/auth/account/page.tsx
tasks.acceptance: User can view and manage account settings

tasks.description: Implement Firestore user preferences: save and load favorite sessions - targets: lib/userPreferences.ts, components/FavoriteButton.tsx
tasks.acceptance: User can favorite and unfavorite sessions

tasks.description: Build watch history component showing recently viewed sessions - targets: components/WatchHistory.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Recent sessions appear in user watch history

tasks.description: Build Canvas track map component rendering circuit from coordinate array - targets: components/TrackMap.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Track renders from coordinate data, adapts to canvas size

tasks.description: Build track rendering utilities: coordinate scaling, rotation, driver positioning - targets: utils/trackRenderer.ts
tasks.acceptance: Driver positions plot correctly from telemetry coordinates

tasks.description: Build race data service fetching telemetry, positions, laps, weather from OpenF1 - targets: lib/raceData.ts
tasks.acceptance: Race data loads for a session, returns structured frame data

tasks.description: Build frame buffer with sequential access and pre-fetching - targets: lib/frameBuffer.ts
tasks.acceptance: Frames accessible by index, pre-fetches next segment

tasks.description: Implement replay playback engine hook: play/pause, seek, speed multiplier - targets: hooks/useReplayEngine.ts
tasks.acceptance: Replay plays, pauses, and seeks at correct times and speeds

tasks.description: Build leaderboard: positions, names, team colors, lap counts, OUT status - targets: components/Leaderboard.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Leaderboard updates every frame, retired drivers show OUT

tasks.description: Implement driver selection and telemetry HUD: speed, gear, throttle, brake, DRS - targets: components/DriverTelemetryHUD.tsx, hooks/useDriverSelection.ts
tasks.acceptance: Clicking a driver selects them, telemetry HUD updates per frame

tasks.description: Build weather and session info panel: lap, time, temps, humidity, wind - targets: components/WeatherPanel.tsx, components/SessionInfoBar.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Panel updates frame-by-frame with all weather data

tasks.description: Build race control messages feed: flags, SC/VSC status, session changes - targets: components/RaceControlFeed.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Messages display chronologically with flag visuals

tasks.description: Implement safety car visualization on track map with deploy/on-track/return phases - targets: components/SafetyCar.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Safety car renders during SC periods with phase transitions

tasks.description: Build pit stop event display: driver, timing, tyre compound - targets: components/PitStopIndicator.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Pit stops show for relevant drivers at correct frames

tasks.description: Build per-driver telemetry charts: speed trace, gear distribution, throttle/brake timeline - targets: components/TelemetryCharts.tsx, utils/chartRenderer.ts
tasks.acceptance: Charts update in sync with replay for selected driver

tasks.description: Implement responsive mobile-first layout for replay: collapsible panels, touch targets - targets: app/replay/[sessionId]/page.tsx, styles/replay.css
tasks.acceptance: Replay usable on 375px mobile viewport, no horizontal scroll

tasks.description: Add touch replay controls: tap to play/pause, swipe seek, pinch zoom - targets: hooks/useTouchControls.ts, components/ReplayControls.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Replay controllable via touch gestures on mobile

tasks.description: Add loading skeletons and error boundaries for API failures - targets: components/ErrorBoundary.tsx, components/LoadingSkeleton.tsx
tasks.acceptance: API failures show user-friendly error UI

tasks.description: Add ARIA accessibility attributes to TrackMap component - targets: components/TrackMap.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Track map has keyboard navigation and screen reader labels

tasks.description: Add ARIA accessibility attributes to Leaderboard component - targets: components/Leaderboard.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Leaderboard has keyboard navigation and screen reader labels

tasks.description: Add ARIA accessibility attributes to ReplayControls component - targets: components/ReplayControls.tsx
tasks.acceptance: Playback controls have keyboard navigation and screen reader labels

tasks.description: Performance optimization: lazy-load panels, memoize canvas render, code-split with dynamic imports - targets: app/replay/[sessionId]/page.tsx, next.config.ts
tasks.acceptance: Lighthouse performance score >= 80 on mobile

tasks.description: Final Vercel deployment, env var audit, README with setup docs - targets: README.md
tasks.acceptance: Deployment succeeds, README documents setup and architecture
